title: Other Prepositions & Prepositional Phrases
summary: A scannable inventory of sin, sobre, bajo, entre, hacia, hasta, desde, ante, and tras, the closed list of compound prepositional phrases (a través de, a pesar de, en cuanto a, junto a...), and the full desde vs. desde hace vs. hace...que time-expression system promised in Chapter 47, including how each pairs with the present versus the imperfect.
